title: Tmag_Axes Property
description: Sets or returns the subject axis for calculating the resultant torque.
notes:
Tmag is the resultant force from the subject axes selected from X, Y, and Z axes.

This property is used when when setting or checking the subject axes to obtain the resultant torque with respect to the Force Trigger Object and Force Monitor Object.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Control

Force Trigger
examples:
Function Test_Tmag_Axes Integer iVar FSet FM1.Tmag_Axes, FG_ZX FGet FM1.Tmag_Axes, iVar Print iVar
Fend
